VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Functional Modelling and Classification of Longitudinal Data" is confirmed to exist in the *Scandinavian Journal of Statistics*, vol. 32(2), pp. 223–240 (2005), authored by Hans-Georg Müller. The author mismatch flagged by the automated checker is merely a formatting difference between "H.-G. Müller" (initials) and "HANS-GEORG MULLER" (full name, all caps), which is a trivial typographic/style variation — not a substantive discrepancy.
LINK: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/j.1467-9469.2005.00429.x
